level_limits.note: Fighter limit can be extended based on STR: 17=10th, 18=11th, 18/50+=12th

save_bonus_vs_magic.description: Dwarves gain a bonus to saving throws vs. magic (rod, staff, wand, spell) based on CON.

save_bonus_vs_poison.description: Same bonus as vs. magic applies to poison saves.

detect_grades_slopes.description: Can detect grade or slope in a passage, 1-5 on d6.

detect_new_construction.description: Can detect new tunnel or passage construction, 1-5 on d6.

detect_sliding_shifting_walls.description: Can detect sliding or shifting walls or rooms, 1-4 on d6.

detect_traps.description: Can detect stonework traps (pits, deadfalls, etc.), 1-3 on d6.

determine_depth_underground.description: Can determine approximate depth underground, 1-3 on d6.

vs_giant_class.description: When fighting giant-class creatures (ogres, trolls, ogre magi, giants, titans), those creatures attack at -4 to hit.

vs_orcs_goblins.description: +1 to hit orcs, half-orcs, goblins, and hobgoblins.

restrictions.note: Dwarves may not be magic-users, illusionists, druids, monks, paladins, or rangers.
